input.evidence_excerpt: fn tokenize(expr: &str) -> Vec<String> { let mut tokens = Vec::new(); let mut chars = expr.chars().peekable(); while let Some(c) = chars.next() { if c.is_whitespace() { continue; } if c.is_ascii_digit() || c == '.' { let mut num = String::new(); num.push(c); while let Some(&next) = chars.peek() { if next.is_ascii_digit() || next == '.' { num.push(chars.next().unwrap()); } else { break; } } tokens.push(num); } else if c.is_alphabetic() { let mut word = String::new(); word.push(c); while let Some(&next) = chars.peek() { if next.is_alphabetic() { word.push(chars.next().unwrap()); } else { break; } } tokens.push(word); } else { tokens.push(c.to_string()); } } tokens }
